# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:latest

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy your orchestration service files here
COPY . .

# Install necessary packages if needed (example: curl, git, etc.)
RUN apk add --no-cache curl

# Run your orchestration service
ENTRYPOINT ["./your-orchestration-service"] 

# Bind mount the Docker socket to allow interaction with the host's Docker daemon
VOLUME ["/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"] 

# Ensure the container runs as the root user
USER root
